SEARCH
Package com.berryrock.integrationhub.model

Class GoogleSheetAddressRow

java.lang.Object
com.berryrock.integrationhub.model.GoogleSheetAddressRow
public class GoogleSheetAddressRow extends Object
Represents one data row from the Loan Tape Google Sheet. Part of the address pipeline — rows are fetched by GoogleSheetsClientImpl.fetchAddressRows(java.lang.String, java.lang.String) and matched against Salesforce Opportunity records and Buildium unit records during pipeline execution. The column names that map to each field are configured in AddressPipelineProperties.Header. The pipeline reads these headers dynamically at runtime so the sheet layout can change without a code deployment. After matching, the pipeline writes Salesforce and Buildium IDs plus quality and sync status back into the sheet via a batch update using SheetBatchUpdateRequest.

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    GoogleSheetAddressRow()
    Constructs an empty row.

    Returns the Buildium property ID (same value as getBuildiumId() in the current pipeline; kept as a separate column for sheet compatibility).

  • Constructor Details

    • GoogleSheetAddressRow

      public GoogleSheetAddressRow()
      Constructs an empty row.

  • Method Details

    • getRowNumber

      public int getRowNumber()
      Returns the 1-based row number within the spreadsheet.
      Returns:
      row number

    • setRowNumber

      public void setRowNumber(int rowNumber)
      Sets the row number.
      Parameters:
      rowNumber - 1-based row index in the spreadsheet

    • getAddress

      public String getAddress()
      Returns the raw address string from the sheet.
      Returns:
      address string, possibly a combined one-line address

    • setAddress

      public void setAddress(String address)
      Sets the raw address string.
      Parameters:
      address - address as it appears in the sheet

    • getCity

      public String getCity()
      Returns the city component from the sheet.
      Returns:
      city name, or null if the column is blank

    • setCity

      public void setCity(String city)
      Sets the city component.
      Parameters:
      city - city name

    • getState

      public String getState()
      Returns the state component from the sheet.
      Returns:
      state code, or null if the column is blank

    • setState

      public void setState(String state)
      Sets the state component.
      Parameters:
      state - two-letter state code

    • getPostalCode

      public String getPostalCode()
      Returns the postal code from the sheet.
      Returns:
      ZIP or postal code, or null if the column is blank

    • setPostalCode

      public void setPostalCode(String postalCode)
      Sets the postal code.
      Parameters:
      postalCode - ZIP or postal code

    • getSalesforceId

      public String getSalesforceId()
      Returns the Salesforce Opportunity ID stored in this row.
      Returns:
      Opportunity ID, or null if the column is blank or not yet matched

    • setSalesforceId

      public void setSalesforceId(String salesforceId)
      Sets the Salesforce Opportunity ID.
      Parameters:
      salesforceId - Opportunity ID from Salesforce

    • getBuildiumId

      public String getBuildiumId()
      Returns the Buildium property ID stored in this row.
      Returns:
      Buildium property ID, or null if not yet matched

    • setBuildiumId

      public void setBuildiumId(String buildiumId)
      Sets the Buildium property ID.
      Parameters:
      buildiumId - Buildium property ID

    • getNormalizedAddress

      public String getNormalizedAddress()
      Returns the normalized composite key used internally for matching.
      Returns:
      normalized key, or null if not yet populated

    • setNormalizedAddress

      public void setNormalizedAddress(String normalizedAddress)
      Sets the normalized composite key.
      Parameters:
      normalizedAddress - key produced by the pipeline's normalization step

    • getSfStandardizedAddress

      public String getSfStandardizedAddress()
      Returns the standardized address string from the matched Salesforce record.
      Returns:
      SF-standardized address, or null if not yet matched

    • setSfStandardizedAddress

      public void setSfStandardizedAddress(String sfStandardizedAddress)
      Sets the Salesforce-standardized address.
      Parameters:
      sfStandardizedAddress - standardized address from the matched SF record

    • getSfAddressQuality

      public String getSfAddressQuality()
      Returns the quality label assigned by the pipeline.
      Returns:
      "CLEAN", "PARTIAL", or "SUSPICIOUS", or null

    • setSfAddressQuality

      public void setSfAddressQuality(String sfAddressQuality)
      Sets the quality label.
      Parameters:
      sfAddressQuality - quality label from the pipeline

    • getSfAddressSyncStatus

      public String getSfAddressSyncStatus()
      Returns the sync status written back by the pipeline.
      Returns:
      one of SYNCED, SYNCED_ADDRESS_ONLY, SYNCED_PARTIAL, AMBIGUOUS_BUILDIUM_MATCH, or null

    • setSfAddressSyncStatus

      public void setSfAddressSyncStatus(String sfAddressSyncStatus)
      Sets the sync status.
      Parameters:
      sfAddressSyncStatus - sync status label

    • getBuildiumLeaseId

      public String getBuildiumLeaseId()
      Returns the Buildium lease ID stored in this row.
      Returns:
      Buildium lease ID, or null if not yet matched

    • setBuildiumLeaseId

      public void setBuildiumLeaseId(String buildiumLeaseId)
      Sets the Buildium lease ID.
      Parameters:
      buildiumLeaseId - Buildium lease ID

    • getBuildiumPropertyId

      public String getBuildiumPropertyId()
      Returns the Buildium property ID (same value as getBuildiumId() in the current pipeline; kept as a separate column for sheet compatibility).
      Returns:
      Buildium property ID, or null if not yet matched

    • setBuildiumPropertyId

      public void setBuildiumPropertyId(String buildiumPropertyId)
      Sets the Buildium property ID.
      Parameters:
      buildiumPropertyId - Buildium property ID
